case_title: IRITANI WENDOLYN LEE VS GREENSPAN RON DBA RON GREENSPAN VOLKSWAGEN

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED RECEIPT TO RON GREENSPAN RETURNED WITH ILLEGIBLE SIGNATURE.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IRITANI WENDOLYN LEE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GREENSPAN RON DBA RON GREENSPAN VOLKSWAGEN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
